Speakers.Speaker: Major Arcana Effect: The Hanged Man

Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Acquire a random Incense Card. Once you reach the Major Arcana card limit, they will stop appearing in Shuffle Time. This limit will increase as you progress in the Abyss of Time.[n]{f 1 1}
